# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run ci` passes locally (or `npm run ci:source` for content-only edits)
- [ ] Content edits follow the MDX conventions in `README.md` (no `> [!NOTE]` callouts, `{/* ... */}` comments, escaped `\$` amounts, markdown `![]()` images)
- [ ] Generated artifacts (`public/` mirrors, sitemap, llms\*.txt) were regenerated if routes or page content changed
